document_meta.title: Die-Cuttable Tape Series DC 2000 Technical Data Sheet
document_meta.source_text: Die-Cuttable Tape Series DC 2000 Technical Data Sheet May 2007

sections.source_text: General Description 3M Die-Cuttable Tape Series DC2000 is a black foam tape designed for the attachment of nameplates, badges and emblems to the exterior of vehicles. This tape is designed to process easily in all die-cutti ng operations, including high-speed rotary operations. 3M Series DC2000 tape exhibits high resistance to pluck and torque (twisting) forces normally associated with the attachment of nameplates and emblems.
sections.title: General Description
sections.content: 3M Die-Cuttable Tape Series DC2000 is a black foam tape designed for the attachment of nameplates, badges and emblems to the exterior of vehicles. This tape is designed to process easily in all die-cutting operations, including high-speed rotary operations. 3M Series DC2000 tape exhibits high resistance to pluck and torque (twisting) forces normally associated with the attachment of nameplates and emblems.

sections.source_text: 3M Series DC2000 tape offers the following key features: • Excellent adhesion to paint and chrome • Excellent torque (twist) resistance. 3M Series DC2000 tape has a firm core that resists twisting forces that may result in the detachment of individual letters. • Excellent resistance to impact in cold weather.
sections.title: Key Features
content: Excellent adhesion to paint and chrome
Firm core resists twisting forces that may result in detachment of individual letters
Excellent resistance to impact in cold weather

sections.source_text: Some typical applications for 3M Series DC2000 tape include: ● Nameplates, badges and emblems • Low demand applications whose primary attachment methods are mechanical. Examples include: attachment of lightwei ght pillar covers, miscellaneous sealing applications and spoiler applications that require tape to perform as a gasket.
sections.title: Typical Applications
content: Low demand applications whose primary attachment methods are mechanical
Spoiler applications that require tape to perform as a gasket

sections.source_text: Prote DL-1 Acrylic Adhesive ctive Liner (See Below) DL-2 Acrylic Adhesive Black Acrylic Polymer Foam Product Construction
sections.title: Product Construction
sections.content: Protective liner / DL-1 Acrylic Adhesive / Black Acrylic Polymer Foam / DL-2 Acrylic Adhesive

sections.source_text: Options Liner Configuration SC2 White, 2-side silicone-coated, High Den sity Polyethylene PET Clear, 2-side silicone-coated, Polyester
sections.title: Options Liner Configuration
content: SC2 White, 2-side silicone-coated, High Density Polyethylene

sections.source_text: Shelf Life and 50% RH. One year from date of receipt by customer when stored at 4o C – 38o C (40o F – 100o F) and 0 – 95% relative humidity (RH). The optimum storage conditions are 22o C (72o F)
sections.title: Shelf Life and Storage
sections.content: One year from date of receipt by customer when stored at 4°C–38°C (40°F–100°F) and 0–95% relative humidity (RH). The optimum storage conditions are 22°C (72°F) and 50% RH.

sections.title: Physical Properties
sections.content: Matrix table with item codes DC2005, DC2008, DC2011, DC2015 and at least thickness and density rows.

sections.source_text: Processing Compatibility Rotary, flat bed, and laser die cutting operations.
sections.title: Processing Compatibility
sections.content: Rotary, flat bed, and laser die cutting operations.

sections.source_text: Pluck Testing (Typical Results) Maintains pluck adhesion on new low surface energy and scratch- and mar-resistant paint systems in addition to conventional paint systems.
sections.title: Pluck Testing
sections.content: Maintains pluck adhesion on new low surface energy and scratch- and mar-resistant paint systems in addition to conventional paint systems.

sections.source_text: Torque Testing (Typical Results): 3M Series DC2000 tape demonstrates higher resistance to twisting forces (torque) compared to typical competitive tapes.
sections.title: Torque Testing
sections.content: 3M Series DC2000 tape demonstrates higher resistance to twisting forces (torque) compared to typical competitive tapes.

sections.source_text: Static Shear (Typical Results): Exceeds 100 hours at 70o C (158o F) Static shear tests are run with 25.4 mm (1.0 in.) wide by 25.4 mm (1 X 1 in.) long tape on chrome, 6.8 kg. (15 lb.) roll down against enamel paint. Weight is 500 grams (1.1 lb.).
sections.title: Static Shear
sections.content: Exceeds 100 hours at 70°C (158°F). Test condition: 25.4 mm wide by 25.4 mm long tape on chrome, 6.8 kg roll down against enamel paint, weight 500 grams.
